keyRules: Max. 120 m above ground level (EASA Open Category)
Registration as a UAS operator (free) for drones weighing 250 g or more or equipped with a camera
Required A1/A3 online training — minimum age 16
Mandatory registration with DroneTower in controlled airspace zones
Warsaw: Permission from the State Protection Service (SOP) is required near government facilities
Always maintain visual line of sight (VLOS) with the drone
Never fly over people, crowds, or public events
DRA-RM zones (below 6 km, with altitude restrictions) and DRA-RH zones (above 6 km) — check drony.gov.pl
Night flights are prohibited without special permission
National Parks and Natura 2000 Sites: Restrictions Are in Effect
importantNotes: The DroneTower app is required for flight notifications in CTR zones
Warsaw: SOP approval required near government facilities
Registration is free and valid in all EU/EASA countries
Fines of up to 50,000 PLN for violations
The GDPR applies to the recording of identifiable images

fields.disclaimerText: Before flying, always check official sources from the Civil Aviation Authority (ULC) and PANSA DroneMap. This app is a tool—it is not a source of law. Poland applies EASA regulations with national supplements.
